name: ayda
description: Supervises a headless `claude -p` session and re-emits its stream-json output as AG-UI events over SSE.

comments.runtime: Node >=23 runs the .ts sources natively (type stripping). The demo needs NO deps.
comments.@ag-ui/core: PINNED reference for validating emitted AG-UI events against the canonical Zod schemas in CI. Local types in agent/types/agui.ts mirror it.
comments.@opentelemetry/api: Optional at runtime — telemetry degrades to no-op if absent. The OTLP SDK/exporter is provided out-of-process by the astropods telemetry adapter.
